title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 237.140 - Rates posted
text:
237.140.  Rates posted. — Every ferryman shall keep a list of the legal rates of ferriage, printed, or written in a legible hand, constantly posted up at some public place at the ferry or ferryhouse.
(RSMo 1939 § 15297) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14209; 1919 § 5543; 1909 § 6486
